examples: Using a single 96 dpi resolution background picture for all scenarios.
One of these images would produce a 300-dpi print covering half a basketball court.
That’s why printing is done with a resolution of 300 or even 240 DPI – “good enough” quality.
Gamers can even program the button to switch only between the DPI settings they use most.
Also, to detect malware, the best practice is to employ deep packet inspection (DPI).
